calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brad Jones appeared by zoom for Petitioner.
Kurt Siebert appeared by zoom for Guardian Ad Litem ("GAL").

The court noted that no one was present to object to the petition. The court waives defective notice, stated that notice was not provided within 30-days, that direct notice was not provided to the guardian ad litem and that no attachment was provided regarding remote appearances. Mr. Siebert stated "great". The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lee. Not reported.
